title: clover sidecar
description: Schema for a Clover YAML sidecar (<target>.clover.yaml): a list of directive entries that keep a comment-less file (strict JSON) up to date out of band.

items.description: One directive, expressed as native YAML keys. Carry a jq or find locator to name the line it governs.

provider.description: Upstream source: github, gitlab, gitea, docker, helm, hashicorp, node, http, manual. Omit to follow another entry.

tool.description: A mise registry tool name, resolved to the GitHub repository it tracks (github).

registry.description: Container registry host (docker); chart repository URL or oci:// base (helm).

platform.description: OCI platform os/arch for per-arch digest resolution (docker).

host.description: Forge host for a self-managed instance (github/gitlab/gitea).

source.description: What to list upstream: tags or releases (github/gitlab/gitea).

package.description: Package name, scoped npm names included (npm, pypi).

channel.description: Release channel to track: stable (default) or beta (rust).

extract.description: Glob-with-<version> or /regex/ over a text http response body.

user-agent.description: User-Agent header for the http request; defaults to clover.

jq.description: Locator: a path() expression that resolves to the target line (sidecar, JSON only). Also a jq program over an http response body.

find.description: Locator and rewrite pattern: a glob with <version> (and other <placeholders>), or /regex/.

constraint.description: Version constraint: a keyword (major, minor, patch) or a range (~>1.2, >=1.0.0).

tag-prefix.description: Scope selection to tags carrying this prefix (monorepo components), e.g. @scope/pkg@.

cooldown.description: Minimum age before a version is adopted, e.g. 7d, 24h.

behind.description: Stay this many releases behind the newest.

downgrade.description: Allow selecting a version older than the current one.

track.description: Track a floating ref (docker tag, github branch); * infers it from the line.

verify.description: Deep-verify this entry's secure pin against its upstream tag.

verify-branch.description: Allowed source-branch glob or /regex/ for deep verify; defaults to the repo's default branch.

id.description: Publish this entry's result under this id for followers to read.

from.description: Follow the producer entry with this id instead of resolving upstream.

value.description: What a follower projects: version, commit, or sha256.

select.description: Follow the old or new value of the producer.

sha256-source.description: How to source a value=sha256: auto, digest, checksums, download, or verify.

disabled.description: Disable this entry: true, false, or a reason string.
